form.formComment: Returns from a five-and-a-half months break and only other fresh up run was on debut, when a 16.64 winner over 300m at Murray Bridge Straight. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 2 for the first time after finishing a 10 length eighth at this track (26.95) in a Grade 5. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (19.98) when seventh over 340m at this track in a Other. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when third behind Grapefruit Silly at Launceston last start over 515m (30.36). Gets back so might need a bit of luck.

form.formComment: Could only manage seventh last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when second (26.11) over 461m at this track. Boxed out wide but in the mix on his best form.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 515m at Launceston beaten 12 lengths (30.75) behind Grapefruit Silly in a Grade 5 on April 6. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.
